pass1_value.note: Docs show OAuth (application id/secret and access tokens) for most endpoints and a license-key verification endpoint that does not require OAuth (public). 'token' used for generated access tokens; none_public refers to the license verification endpoint which is public.

final_value.note: Gumroad's official API Authentication documentation lists two authentication types: Personal Access Token and OAuth. For both, API requests use an access token either as a URL parameter named "access_token" or as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
